privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to generate a synthetic P&ID diagram from scratch without any external source data. The expected output file paths (/home/ga/Diagrams/pid_unit100.eddx and /home/ga/Diagrams/pid_unit100.pdf) are verified against the export and evaluation scripts. The required text labels (T-100, P-101, E-102, Unit 100: Feed Pre-heating Loop) and shape keywords (Valve, Pump, Tank, Exchanger) are explicitly mandated in the prompt instructions and actively checked by the verifier's XML parsing logic.
